title: solenostemon rutenbergianus
intro: Solenostemon rutenbergianus, also known as the African Blue Sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of East Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Solenostemon rutenbergianus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Solenostemon rutenbergianus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional remedies such as tinctures and essential oils.
